subject: A blue-skinned humanoid figure with pointed ears and long flowing hair, holding a small glowing geometric object aloft, standing before a cosmic landscape of crystal formations
description: A mid-shot of a blue-skinned figure with clearly visible pointed ears and long hair swept back, wearing a simple dark wrapped garment. The figure raises one hand to display a small glowing white geometric shape — resembling a crystalline compass or abstract map instrument. The background is a deep midnight blue cosmic plane: pink and blue energy spirals drift across the sky, and tall dark crystal spires rise in silhouette at the horizon. Scattered light points suggest stars or energy particles. The mood is contemplative and wonder-filled — a surveyor studying an ever-shifting magical landscape.
foreground: The figure's torso and raised hand with glowing geometric object
background: Cosmic plane with crystal spires, pink and blue energy spirals, scattered light particles
emotion: focused wonder; the figure studies the object with calm intensity
